style_effects: Gentle sparkling dust trails drift upward like bioluminescent pollen, dissolving into soft petal-shaped aura particles that pulse with a pastel pink and lavender glow. The aura emits a delicate, warm luminescence resembling morning dew under a soft golden hour sun, with subtle light refraction creating prismatic ripples around its leafy wings. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
